parts.text: /review Verify latest fix for cancel intent stickiness in workspace-deployment-runner.ts: cancel_requested_at should not be cleared on cancel accepted=false paths during polling/retry. Blocking issues only.

2211: export async function markWorkspaceDeploymentSucceededIfNotCancelled(
2212:   db: D1Database,
2213:   input: {
2214:     workspaceId: string;
2215:     deploymentId: string;
2216:     sourceSnapshotSha256: string;
2217:     sourceBundleKey: string;
2218:     deployedUrl: string;
2219:     providerDeploymentId: string;
2220:     result: unknown;
2221:     finishedAt: string;
2222:   }
2223: ): Promise<boolean> {
2224:   const updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
2225:   const result = await db
2226:     .prepare(
2227:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2228:        SET status = 'succeeded',
2229:            source_snapshot_sha256 = ?,
2230:            source_bundle_key = ?,
2231:            deployed_url = ?,
2232:            provider_deployment_id = ?,
2233:            result_json = ?,
2234:            error_code = NULL,
2235:            error_message = NULL,
2236:            finished_at = ?,
2237:            duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
2238:            updated_at = ?
2239:        WHERE id = ?
2240:          AND workspace_id = ?
2241:          AND status = 'running'
2242:          AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2243:     )
2244:     .bind(
2245:       input.sourceSnapshotSha256,
2246:       input.sourceBundleKey,
2247:       input.deployedUrl,
2248:       input.providerDeploymentId,

2251:       input.finishedAt,
2252:       updatedAt,
2253:       input.deploymentId,
2254:       input.workspaceId
2255:     )

2257: 
2258:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;

644: function isRunningDeploymentStale(startedAt: string | null): boolean {
645:   if (!startedAt) {
646:     return false;
647:   }
648: 
649:   const startedAtEpochMs = Date.parse(startedAt);
650:   if (!Number.isFinite(startedAtEpochMs)) {
651:     return false;
652:   }
653: 
654:   return Date.now() - startedAtEpochMs >= STALE_RUNNING_TIMEOUT_MS;
655: }

state.title: packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.test.ts

parts.text:
Blocking issue found.

- `cancel_requested_at` is still being explicitly cleared when reconciling a `running + cancelRequestedAt` deployment to `succeeded`, which includes the `cancel accepted=false` polling/retry path you called out.
  - `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1301`
  - `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1555`
  - `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1827`
- Why this is blocking: in the polling path, when `provider.cancelDeployment(...)` returns `accepted: false`, execution continues and can later observe provider `succeeded`; these branches then null out `cancelRequestedAt`, breaking cancel-intent stickiness.
- Net effect: cancel intent is lost on exactly the rejected-cancel continuation path (polling/retry) that should preserve it.
